---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition to the reference implementation
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the current code makes hard or impossible? Concrete use case preferred over abstract wishes.

## Proposed change

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why did you rule them out?

## Pattern fit

This project is a **reference implementation** of the Triage-and-Voice pattern. How does your proposal preserve (or intentionally reshape) the separation between:

- **Triage** — LLM classification of user intent
- **Gate** — deterministic routing and data injection
- **Voice** — persona rendering with injected data

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues.
